question: How many graduation ceremonies have I attended in the past three months?

retrieval_results.context:
User is researching digital marketing certification programs and wants a comparison of online versus in-person programs, while reflecting on family matters; they feel guilty about missing their nephew Jack's eighth grade graduation ceremony in December 2025 and have been thinking a lot about family lately.
User attended best friend Rachel's master's degree graduation ceremony a couple of weeks ago, which inspired them to invest in their own education and growth.
User is excited to start the Google Digital Garage course to build a solid foundation in digital marketing, plans to keep the assistant updated on progress and reach out if questions arise, expresses gratitude for advice and guidance, and is amazed at how quickly their little cousin Emma is growing up, recalling attending her preschool graduation ceremony just a couple of months ago.
User plans to study 5-6 hours per week, most productive in the morning, works full-time, prefers weekend morning sessions, wants to allocate 3-4 months to complete the Digital Marketing Certified Associate program from Digital Marketing Institute, and wants buffer time for unexpected events.
User is seeking detailed information about the career support services offered by the Digital Marketing Institute, including job placement assistance, career coaching, job boards, networking events, alumni network, and notable alumni from major companies, as part of evaluating the DMI certification program against the free HubSpot program.
User is planning to attend their alma mater's annual alumni reunion in a few weeks to network with industry professionals and explore job opportunities, and has decided to update their LinkedIn profile, prepare an elevator pitch, research attendees, bring business cards, and follow up afterward; additionally, User is considering reaching out
User is evaluating two digital marketing certification programs—one specialized in SEO and content marketing, the other comprehensive covering a broader range of topics to enhance skills and become more competitive in the job market, leveraging existing social media marketing experience, and is seeking cost estimates, financial aid or scholarship options, as well as information on job prospects and salary ranges associated with each certification, and has decided to lean toward the Digital Marketing Certified Associate program from Digital Marketing Institute.
to Dr. Smith, their favorite undergraduate professor who will receive a lifetime achievement award at the event, to congratulate and seek advice
well information on job prospects and salary ranges associated with each certification
